title: Set 1
questions: If you could invite anyone in the world to dinner, who would it be and why?
Would you like to be famous? In what way?
Before calling someone, do you ever rehearse what you'll say? Why?
What would constitute a perfect day for you?
When did you last sing to yourself? To someone else?
If you could live to any age with either mind or body preserved, which would you choose?
Share an embarrassing moment you can laugh about now.
When did you last cry in front of another person? By yourself?
Name a personal failure that later taught you something important.
Tell a true personal story in four minutes or less.
If you could change one thing about how you were raised, what would it be?
Share something you and your partner might appreciate about each other (or about yourself).

title: Set 2
questions: Name three things you and your partner appear to have in common.
Share a memory you cherish from childhood.
How do you feel about your relationship with your mother/father?
Tell your partner something you like about them that you may not say often.
What, if anything, is too serious to be joked about?
Share a private thought you rarely voice aloud.
When did you last feel truly vulnerable? Describe it.
What would you want to be remembered for?
Tell an unusual or meaningful dream you've had.
What's something you've never told anyone before?
Describe a moment when you felt deeply connected to someone else.
What does intimacy mean to you?

title: Set 3
questions: When did you first realize you felt romantic interest in someone? Describe.
What would you do differently in a close relationship to deepen it?
Share a personal fear about relationships and how you cope.
What's the most meaningful compliment you've ever received?
Describe something you cherish about your life right now.
If you could change one thing about yourself, what would it be?
What's an intimate moment you wish to experience in the future?
How important is physical affection to you? Explain.
Tell a time when you forgave someone and why.
What's one hope you have for your closest relationships?
Share a secret that shaped who you are.
Finish this sentence: 'I wish someone would know that I...'
